title.ko: 고압 또는 고속의 연소생성물의 생성, 예. 가스터빈 연소실(초대기압에서의 조정을 위해 특별히 조정되는 유동층 연소 장치 F23C 10/16)
title.en: GENERATING COMBUSTION PRODUCTS OF HIGH PRESSURE OR HIGH VELOCITY, e.g. GAS-TURBINE COMBUSTION CHAMBERS (fluidised bed combustion apparatus specially adapted for operation at superatmospheric pressures F23C0010160000)

title.ko: 액체 또는 가스상 연료를 사용하는 연속 연소실
title.en: Continuous combustion chambers using liquid or gaseous fuel

title.ko: 공기류(air-flow) 또는 가스류(gas-flow)의 형상에 특징이 있는 것(역류 연소실 F23R 3/54; 사이클론 또는 와류형 연소실 F23R 3/58)
title.en: characterised by the air-flow or gas-flow configuration (reverse-flow combustion chambers F23R0003540000;cyclone or vortex type combustion chambers F23R0003580000)
Air inlet arrangements
Arrangement of apertures along the flame tube
between annular flame tube sections, e.g. flame tubes with telescopic sections
for primary air (F23R0003060000 takes precedence)
inducing a vortex
by using swirl vanes
with devices inside the flame tube or the combustion chamber to influence the air or gas flow
Flame stabilising means, e.g. flame holders for after-burners of jet-propulsion plants
incorporating fuel injection means
movable, e.g. to an inoperative position; adjustable, e.g. self-adjusting
of the fluid-screen type
Controlling the air flow
characterised by the fuel supply
comprising fuel prevapourising devices
being tubular
Feeding into different combustion zones
Supply of different fuels
comprising rotary fuel injection means
characterised by the use of catalytic means

title.ko: 화염관 또는 연소실의 배치 또는 형상에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: characterised by the arrangement or form of the flame tubes or combustion chambers

title.ko: 관상의 케이싱내에 관상의 화염관을 갖는 연소실(역류 연소실 F23R 3/54)
title.en: Combustion chambers comprising a tubular flame tube within a tubular casing (reverse-flow combustion chambers F23R0003540000)
Combustion chambers comprising an annular arrangement of flame tubes within a common annular casing or within individual casings
Flame tube interconnectors, e.g. cross-over tubes

title.ko: 환상 케이싱내에 환상 화염관을 갖는 연소실 (도우넛형의 연소실 F23R 3/52)
title.en: Combustion chambers comprising an annular flame tube within an annular casing (toroidal combustion chambers F23R0003520000)
Toroidal combustion chambers
Reverse-flow combustion chambers
Combustion chambers having rotary flame tubes
Cyclone or vortex type combustion chambers
Support structures; Attaching or mounting means
Continuous combustion chambers using solid or pulverulent fuel
Intermittent or explosive combustion chambers
